texto: Is everything forbidden us except to fold our arms? Poverty is not written in the stars
autor: under development is not one of God's mysterious designs.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de under development is not one of God's mysterious designs. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Is everything forbidden us except to fold our arms? Poverty is not written in the stars”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, eduardo-galeano, everything, com foco em reflexao.
